learned, happy,
possesses the favour of the ruling class; a terror to his
enemies; religiously inclined, respected and fortunate ;
peaceful domestic environments ; great spiritual
advancement.
Venus.—Well versed in music, polished manners, deep
attachment to mother, many friends, conveyances and
houses; religious by inclined : successful achievement of
desires. This is a favourable yoga for affairs of a domestic
nature, concord and happiness.
Saturn.—Sickly during early years; deprived of mother
and unhappy ; suffers from windy and phlegmatic
complaints; lethargic temperament; will not inherit any
property ; will have troubles from houses and vehicles;
disliked by relatives; desire to live a very secluded life;
unfavourable for domestic or family affairs, unless
beneficially aspected or associated.

Concerning the Fourth House 165
Rahu.—Foolish in behaviour; few friends; will be
subjected to fraud ; or guilty of fraudulent action.
Ketu.—Will be deprived of mother, properties and
